name: BTC Value Reacceptance Exhaustion v1
thesis: BTC 4h is the best-fit similar-asset lane for testing mean reversion from exhaustion only when structure reaccepts prior value. The edge should come from overextension snapping back into value, not from passive oversold buying.
invalidation_condition: Abort if the excursion threshold is too rare, if value reacceptance and exhaustion filters conflict, or if reversion gains cannot overcome cost drag.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Directional extension exhausts, price re-enters value, and reversion toward balance follows over the next few bars.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: When extension becomes crowded, the first credible move back into value can force late participants to unwind into the mean-reversion move.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: BTC 4h is the right similar-asset lane because its excursions are meaningful enough for structure reacceptance to matter while still offering enough density for a 4h mean-reversion test.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If directional moves are genuine continuation instead of exhaustion, reacceptance entries will stand in front of trend.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If participation is healthy but reversions are shallow, reduce target ambition before tightening the excursion trigger.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; excursion and reacceptance are complementary
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: controlled by proximity thresholds rather than exact oversold extremes

long: Take profit: EMA_55 or 1.2 * ATR_14, whichever comes first
short: Take profit: EMA_55 or 1.2 * ATR_14, whichever comes first
